---
title: "„Historische“ Königsinschrift"
---
```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button onclick="setZoom(0.9)">A−</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1)">A</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1.2)">A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', scale);
  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', scale);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('site-zoom');
  if (saved) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', saved);
  }
});
</script>
```

[Datum](../slots/datum.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-datum} ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0001_xr Hm n_01.png){.glyph} *ḫr ḥm n* [König](../slots/koenig.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-k-nig} NN   




## Übersetzung

[Datum](../slots/datum.qmd){.slot-link .slot-datum} unter der Majestät / Regierung des [König](../slots/koenig.qmd){.slot-link .slot-k-nig}

## Schreibvarianten

::: {.glyphvariants-block}

*[ḫr] ḥm n*:

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0001_xr Hm n_01.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0010_xr Hm n_02.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0020_Hm n_01.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0030_Hm n_02.png){.glyph}

*nsw bit*:

- ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_Gr._02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>


:::





```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
